items.prompt: In a multi-file sim session you must know…
choices: Which sources are included and which module is top / TB
items.explain: File set + top selection drive elaboration.

items.prompt: A missing DUT or package file often shows up as…
choices: Compile/elaboration errors or holes in Hierarchy
A green golden compare with no run
items.explain: Console and Hierarchy reveal missing sources.

choices: Is not automatically the top module—you must set top intentionally
items.explain: Top is an explicit project choice.

items.prompt: A minimal multi-file practice set is often a DUT file plus a testbench file.
items.explain: DUT + TB is the classic two-file starter.
